archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) blended with Dark Glassmorphism
emotional_tone: Premium, Calming, Secure, Intelligent, Reducing Mental Load
design_principles: Glassmorphism aesthetic with deep void background.
Evocative typography pairing for a premium 'Chief of Staff' feel.
Micro-interactions on every tap (scale) and page load (fade/scale).
Absolute clarity in data hierarchy, using specific colors to indicate the 'action' type.
Mobile-first, using Expo specific libraries and precise Safe Area handling.

layout_and_spacing.safe_area: Required for all screens, specifically top padding for headers and bottom padding to avoid the floating action bar.

components_guidelines.backgrounds: Use View with backgroundColor '#080910'. Use 'expo-linear-gradient' absolute positioned in corners for radial-like glows.
components_guidelines.cards_smart_feed: Use 'expo-blur' BlurView with intensity={20} to 30, tint='dark'. Wrapper must have borderWidth: 1, borderColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.08)', borderRadius: 24, and shadowColor: '#000', shadowOffset: { width: 0, height: 8 }, shadowOpacity: 0.5, shadowRadius: 16. Inner content should prominently display category indicator (Orange, Indigo, Emerald).
components_guidelines.floating_action_bar: Absolute positioned at the bottom. Glassmorphism pill shape. Central prominent 'Camera' button (slightly elevated), flanked by 'Mic' and 'Manual Entry' buttons. Use lucide-react-native icons.
components_guidelines.sunday_brief_modal: Full screen overlay. Background uses the generated 'ai_sunday_brief_bg' image with a dark overlay and high BlurView intensity. Text should be large Playfair Display headings with Inter data points.
components_guidelines.buttons: All touchables must use Animated API or react-native-reanimated for a slight scale down on onPressIn and scale back on onPressOut. Primary buttons should have a solid glass background or subtle gradient.
components_guidelines.icons: Use 'lucide-react-native'. Color should map to the semantic category or text secondary.
components_guidelines.testing: All interactive elements must have a 'testID' prop (equivalent to data-testid in web).

animations.screen_transitions: Fade and slightly scale in content upon mount.
animations.interactions: Scale button to 0.95 on press. Smooth spring release.

onboarding_bg.description: Premium dark mesh gradient for the Google Sign-in onboarding background.

ai_sunday_brief_bg.description: Abstract glowing orb background for the AI Sunday Brief.

user_avatar.description: Avatar for the primary 'COO' user (Settings, Header).

family_avatar_child.description: Avatar for a family member profile in settings/feed.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use ONLY Expo/React Native components (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, Image, Modal, SafeAreaView). DO NOT USE HTML elements.
Do not use Tailwind CSS. Implement all styling using StyleSheet.create().
Install and use 'expo-blur' for the glass cards and floating action bar.
Install and use 'expo-linear-gradient' for the background glows.
Install and use '@expo-google-fonts/playfair-display' (italic) and '@expo-google-fonts/inter'. Ensure fonts are loaded before rendering.
Implement a Bottom Tab navigator structure natively or manually, but remember the Bottom Action Bar with Mic/Camera floats OVER the tabs.
Remember to include 'testID' attributes on all touchables.
